tests.title: [TC-AUTH-001] Valid credentials — returns 200 with token and userId
[TC-AUTH-002] Wrong password — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-AUTH-003] Non-existent user — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-AUTH-004] Missing password field — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-005] Missing email field — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-006] Empty request body — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-007] Response schema — token is a non-empty string
[TC-AUTH-008] New user registration — returns 201 with userId
[TC-AUTH-009] Duplicate email — returns 409 Conflict
[TC-AUTH-010] Missing name field — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-011] Missing email field — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-012] Missing password field — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-013] Empty request body — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-AUTH-014] Registered user can login immediately after registration
[TC-PROD-001] No filters — returns 200 with product list and pagination meta
[TC-PROD-002] Filter by category=electronics — returns 200 with filtered results
[TC-PROD-003] Pagination — page=1&limit=5 returns at most 5 products
[TC-PROD-004] Pagination — page=2 returns next set of results
[TC-PROD-005] Combined filter — category + pagination returns correct shape
[TC-PROD-006] Unknown category — returns 200 with empty data array
[TC-PROD-007] Product object schema — has id, name, price, category, stock
[TC-PROD-008] Valid product ID — returns 200 with product details
[TC-PROD-009] Non-existent product ID — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-PROD-010] Product price is a positive number
[TC-PROD-011] Product stock is a non-negative integer
[TC-CART-001] Add valid item — returns 201 with cartTotal
[TC-CART-002] Add another item — cartTotal increases
[TC-CART-003] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-CART-004] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-CART-005] Missing productId — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-CART-006] Missing quantity — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-CART-007] Non-existent productId — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-CART-008] Zero quantity — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-CART-009] Empty body — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-CART-010] View cart — returns 200 with items, subtotal, itemCount
[TC-CART-011] Cart subtotal matches itemCount > 0 when items added
[TC-CART-012] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-CART-013] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-CART-014] Remove existing item — returns 200 with updated cartTotal
[TC-CART-015] Remove non-existent item — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-CART-016] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-CART-017] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-001] Place order from non-empty cart — returns 201 with orderId and total
[TC-ORD-002] Place order with empty cart — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-ORD-003] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-004] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-005] Valid orderId — returns 200 with full order details
[TC-ORD-006] Order status is a valid enum value
[TC-ORD-007] Non-existent orderId — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-ORD-008] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-009] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-010] Cancel a pending order — returns 200 with status=cancelled
[TC-ORD-011] Cancel already-cancelled order — returns 422/404 or 200 (API deviation noted)
[TC-ORD-012] Cancel non-existent orderId — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-ORD-013] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-ORD-014] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-PAY-001] Valid payment (credit_card) — returns 201 with paymentId
[TC-PAY-002] Duplicate payment for same order — returns 409 Conflict
[TC-PAY-003] Non-existent orderId — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-PAY-004] Missing orderId — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-PAY-005] Missing method — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-PAY-006] Empty body — returns 400 Bad Request
[TC-PAY-007] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-PAY-008] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-PAY-009] Payment method credit_card — accepted by the API
[TC-PAY-009] Payment method debit_card — accepted by the API
[TC-PAY-009] Payment method upi — accepted by the API
[TC-PAY-009] Payment method net_banking — accepted by the API
[TC-PAY-013] Valid paymentId — returns 200 with payment details
[TC-PAY-014] Payment amount is a positive number
[TC-PAY-015] Non-existent paymentId — returns 404 Not Found
[TC-PAY-016] No auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
[TC-PAY-017] Invalid auth token — returns 401 Unauthorized
